{{CargoRelic
|name=Isabella I Portrait
|class_id=22730
|rank=SSS
|affct=CIV
|birthday=06-15
|source=
|description=The painting was finally completed on June 15, 1548.<br>In the history of the Kingdom of Castile, Isabella I was one of the most outstanding monarchs. During her reign, she laid the political foundation for the unification of Spain, and she also sponsored Columbus' voyage across the Atlantic. This portrait painting is a tribute to Isabella I's achievements. In the portrait, Isabella I is dressed in royal attire, exuding a majestic and graceful aura.
|fame=76
|art=67
|fth=58
|civ=107
|tech=54
|ss1=Demon Minion ATK +3%<br>Per 6 kinds of Souls offered, Snail ATK +3<br>Per 6 kinds of Souls offered, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +24<br>Souls offered: 300/300 types
|ss2=Demon Minion ATK +4%<br>Per 6 kinds of Souls offered, Snail ATK +4<br>Per 6 kinds of Souls offered, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +32<br>Souls offered: 300/300 types
|ss3=Demon Minion ATK +5%<br>Per 6 kinds of Souls offered, Snail ATK +5<br>Per 6 kinds of Souls offered, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +40<br>Souls offered: 300/300 types
|ss4=Demon Minion ATK +7%<br>Per 6 kinds of Souls offered, Snail ATK +7<br>Per 6 kinds of Souls offered, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +56<br>Souls offered: 300/300 types
|ss5=Demon Minion ATK +9%<br>Per 6 kinds of Souls offered, Snail ATK +9<br>Per 6 kinds of Souls offered, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +72<br>Souls offered: 300/300 types
|ss6=Demon Minion ATK +12%<br>Per 6 kinds of Souls offered, Snail ATK +12<br>Per 6 kinds of Souls offered, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +96<br>Souls offered: 300/300 types
|ss7=Demon Minion ATK +12%<br>Per 6 kinds of Souls offered, Snail ATK +12<br>Per 6 kinds of Souls offered, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +96<br>Souls offered: 300/300 types<br>Protomon Snail assist DMG + 800 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Surfclam skill III.png|50px]]Place in Surf Clam Biozilla: In Species War, Troop CRIT DMG +9%
|skill2=[[File:Surfclam skill III.png|50px]]Place in the Surf Clam Biozilla: In Species War, Troop CRIT +9%
|skill3=[[File:Biozilla skill III.png|50px]]Place in a Biozilla: This Relic's CIV +15
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Age of Discovery|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +5|orange}}
|3name=Sailor|3rec=163.90M|3atk=455961|3defense=274489|3hp=76448852|3weak=52606
|4name=Ship|4rec=200.42M|4atk=533290|4defense=325868|4hp=113753992|4weak=57696
|5name=Columbus|5rec=263.75M|5atk=644693|5defense=399853|5hp=195140761|5weak=63378
|6name=Isabella I|6rec=379.42M|6atk=803018|6defense=503914|6hp=333819873|6weak=69407
|Arec=529.81M|Aatk=1010805|Adefense=639208|Ahp=540851944|Aweak=75358
}}}}
